knot_assessments.notes: Proper surgeon's knot with double throw as required
Single throw with proper hand switching from throw 1
Single throw with proper hand switching from throw 2

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Excellent closure with no visible gaps, drain securely held by knot

technique_summary: Excellent performance with proper surgeon's knot formation and correct hand switching sequence. Teachers disagreed on total completion time (180s vs 147s) - favored GPT-4o's 147s as phase timings add up correctly. Minor disagreement on suture placement accuracy (3.5mm vs 2.5mm total deviation) - split the difference at 3.0mm. Both agreed on perfect knot technique and complete drain closure.
improvement_suggestions: Work on slightly faster needle loading to reduce overall time
Practice more precise suture placement to minimize deviation from target marks
Ensure tension is consistent during knot placement
strengths: Perfect knot sequence with proper surgeon's knot and hand switching
Excellent drain closure with no gaps
Good bimanual coordination throughout the procedure
